purpose: Product on rustic wooden kitchen counter near window. Morning light.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Cozy lifestyle photography of {product_descriptor} on warm wooden kitchen counter near large window, soft morning daylight creating warm ambient interior glow, small white ceramic pitcher with greenery beside product, gentle steam rising if applicable, modern minimalist kitchen background slightly out of focus, shot on 50mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, defend. Source code in research corpus: T13. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi specialty coffee and artisan food. Kitchen aesthetic can include Saudi traditional elements (brass dallah, Najdi pottery). Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
